description.value:
A long hardwood staff used in martial arts traditions, wielded with flowing strikes from both ends. Lightweight and deceptively quick in trained hands.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Melee d4, Bludgeoning
BasicTwo-Handed, Finesse, Melee d6, Double Ended d4, Bludgeoning, Trip
MasterTwo-Handed, Finesse, Melee d6, Double Ended d4, Bludgeoning, Trip, enhanced flow attacks
Master PerkIf you have Extra Attack, you may make two Double Ended attacks instead of one, or make two opportunity attacks instead of one per reaction.

rmeData.masterPerk: If you have Extra Attack, you may make two Double Ended attacks or two opportunity attacks instead of one per reaction.
